ocr_findings.description: Section bullet markers (●●) for HTTPS and WPA2 headings are rendered as '## 09' in OCR instead of the orange double-bullet symbol. Cosmetic only; heading text itself is correct.

reviewer_notes: Page covers POP/IMAP difference, 試験にはコレが出る callout (SMTP/POP/IMAP definitions), プロトコルのバージョン note, and FTP/NTP supplementary sections. All prose accurately captured. The 学習のポイント mascot image is referenced as img-1.jpeg with no caption loss. Table for WPA2 not on this page (that is page 543).
